TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ya-li-san-ta.Bow-la-min(Amilika a kamu: Alexander FlemingÔľõHulam a kamu: šļěś≠∑ŚĪĪŚ§ß¬∑ŚľóŤźäśėé) kakiliman Ya-li-san-ta.Bow-la-min-cye-se,FRS "Sir Alexander Fleming,1881 a mihca8 a bulad 6 a demiad- 1955 a mihca 3 a bulad 11a demiad", Su-ke-lan migingkiway tu mauzipay, migingkiway tu sapayu, migingkiway tu mulangaway. 1923 a mihcaan mazih ku zung-cin-meey, 1928 a mihcaan maazih ku cin-mey-su, maazih kuyni mipatizeng tu kang-sen-su, singangan tu i hekal ciniza. 1945 a mihcaan, ciniza atu ci Bow-luw-li atu ci cyen-en zayhan sakay pigingkiw tu mey-su a kawaw pakala tu No-pey-al-sen-li-syey anucaay kalaw tu migingkiway tu imelang. nilaculan ÁĒüŚĻ≥ sumamad a nikauzip atu pasubana'ay (Lochfield), . Bow-lay-min lecuh i Su-ke-lan a Low-ke-bey-al-te "Lochfield", nakasu nasumamad u kaluk ku luma'ay. 1906 a mihcaan makay Lun-tunsen-ma-li-ya padekuan "St. Mary's Hospital" padekuay-ke a cacudadan pahezek. sumamad a nikauzip atu pasubana'ay (Lochfield), . Bow-lay-min lecuh i Su-ke-lan a Low-ke-bey-al-te "Lochfield", nakasu nasumamad u kaluk ku luma'ay. 1906 a mihcaan makay Lun-tunsen-ma-li-ya padekuan "St. Mary's Hospital" padekuay-ke a cacudadan pahezek. migingkiw tu kagakÁßĎŚ≠łÁ†ĒÁ©∂ pin-ni-si-linÁõ§ŚįľŤ•Ņśěó 928 a mihcaan ci Bow-lay-min i Lon-tun talakaway a cacudadan musakamu tu bayking, itayaw ci Bow-lay-min misulit tu sakay cacay pakayniay badisusu'cilcay pisuzikuz misulit tu nigingkiwan, i pitanengan yadah ku nipahabay tu kim kulitana badisusu'cilkay "S. aureus", 7 a bulad tu zikuz mey-cin tabu mahetik tini pipahabayan, 8 a bulan ci Bow-la-min a tademawan i inak misalihalay mihibang, 9 a bulad panukas taluma' pitanengan. mahini ci Bow-lay-min maazih niza silangaw matumes nu bayking ku pipahabayan i kalimucu' sicin-mey-cin, liwliw nayi' ku mulangaway nu bayking, ci Bow-lay-min kasenun mazateng ku mey-cin taneng a mipatay tu bayking, kuyni mahiniay musakamu i 1929 a mihcaan nu Ing-kow pitanengan patahkal tu migingkiway tu imelang. zikuz yadah ku nisanga'an niza aca tu malecaday nitanengan, kilul malikeluh tu bunday, hicaen misanga' ku mahiniay pan-ni-si-lin, cangu'ut kuyni a gizice, acaay kalalid sa miazih migingkiw, kilul katahkal nu hwang-an a sapayu,, tademaw amin sakay cn-mey-su anipakatineng caay kanamuh. 1935 . 1935 a mihcaan Ing-kow niw-cin talakaway cacudadan migingkiway tu imelang ci-zen ci Bow-low-li atu miliwkuay i Ing-koway Te-kow migingkiway ci Cyen-en makakadum, migingkiw tu kapahay a cin-mey-su, malaliyas atu macacayatay a hwa-sey, palasawad tu cin-meysu pisanga' a bunday. zikuz saayaway ni Bow-low-li a migikiway a sakaput makay cin-mey-cinan miala patahkal tu kang-sen-su-pan-ni-si-lin "singangan aca tu cin-mey-su", ." Niw-cin migingkiway cu-zen ci Ha-li-s "Henry Harris" namusakamu, "inayi' ci Bow-lay-min, caay ka izaw ci Cyen-en, nayi' ci Cyen-en, cayay ka izaw ci Bow-low-li, inayi' ci Bow-loe-li, cayay ka izaw ci Si-te-li, inayi' ci Si-te-lix, ainayi' ku pan-ni-si-lin." 1941 a mihcaan saayaway a tademaw mikinsaay tu cin-mey-su, maazih ku cin-mey-su, hamin masumad tu ku tademaw atu milaliday a imelangan malalebu tu patay a likisi, palalecad tu nikauzip nu tademaw amanayatu, namahiza ci Bow-lay-min ci Cyen-en atu ci Bow-loe-li mapulung pakalal tu 1945 a mihcaan tu Now-pey-al-i-sye a kawlah. kaliyuhan a kawaw ŤĽľšļč izaw ku cacay nakamuan nika caay ku tatengaay a kungku, sakukamu malukay a wama ni Bow-lay-min namapauzip tu adidi' henay ci Ciw-ci-alnan, wama ni Ciw-ci-al patahkal tu kalisiw papicudad ci Bow-lay-minan amala u sitinengay, zikuz ci Ciw-ci-al i saka tusa lalaisan aca zayhan u cin-mey-su makay amapatay nu imelangan mapauzip. Ci Bow-lay-min pabeli tu tingamian tu cabayan amatineng, patelac a kamu kuyni, zikuz pauzipay ci Ciw-ci-alnan a sapayu u hwang-an a sapayuan caay ku cin-mey-su. uyni patelac a nakamuan lalekalan hakay zayhan hwang-an nu Te-kow Pay-al a pitanengan maazih, i kalalaisan patinakay a sakaput makai patinak na u adaay a kanatal ku pakaazihay tu sapayu, maniyul u Ing-kow a tademaw ku pakaazihay tu cin-mey-su.
S.PHON: ja-r~…ĺi-san-ta.bow-r~…ĺa-min(amir~…ĺika a kamu: ar~…ĺ…ô*and…ôr fr~…ĺ…ômiŇč*ńßur~…ĺam a kamu: ********) kakir~…ĺiman ja-r~…ĺi-san-ta.bow-r~…ĺa-min- ¶j…ô-s…ô,f*s "sir ar~…ĺ…ô*and…ôr fr~…ĺ…ômiŇč,**** a mińß ¶a* a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad- **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad **a d…ômiad", su-k…ô-r~…ĺan migiŇčkiwaj tu mauzipaj, migiŇčkiwaj tu sapaju, migiŇčkiwaj tu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj. **** a mińß ¶aan mazińß ku zuŇč- ¶in-m…ô…ô, **** a mińß ¶aan maazińß ku ¶in-m…ô-su, maazińß kujni mipatiz…ôŇč tu kaŇč-s…ôn-su, siŇčaŇčan tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ ¶iniza. **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶iniza atu ¶i bow-r~…ĺuw-r~…ĺi atu ¶i ¶j…ôn-…ôn zajńßan sakaj pigiŇčkiw tu m…ô-su a kawaw pakar~…ĺa tu no-p…ô-ar~…ĺ-s…ôn-r~…ĺi-sj…ô anu ¶aaj kar~…ĺaw tu migiŇčkiwaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ** sumamad a nikauzip atu pasubana Ē~ °aj (r~…ĺo ¶ńßfi…ôr~…ĺd), . bow-r~…ĺaj-min r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i su-k…ô-r~…ĺan a r~…ĺow-k…ô-b…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô "r~…ĺo ¶ńßfi…ôr~…ĺd", nakasu nasumamad u kar~…ĺuk ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj. **** a mińß ¶aan makaj r~…ĺun-tuns…ôn-ma-r~…ĺi-ja pad…ôkuan "st. marj Ē~ °s ńßospitar~…ĺ" pad…ôkuaj-k…ô a ¶a ¶udadan pańß…ôz…ôk. sumamad a nikauzip atu pasubana Ē~ °aj (r~…ĺo ¶ńßfi…ôr~…ĺd), . bow-r~…ĺaj-min r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i su-k…ô-r~…ĺan a r~…ĺow-k…ô-b…ô-ar~…ĺ-t…ô "r~…ĺo ¶ńßfi…ôr~…ĺd", nakasu nasumamad u kar~…ĺuk ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj. **** a mińß ¶aan makaj r~…ĺun-tuns…ôn-ma-r~…ĺi-ja pad…ôkuan "st. marj Ē~ °s ńßospitar~…ĺ" pad…ôkuaj-k…ô a ¶a ¶udadan pańß…ôz…ôk. migiŇčkiw tu kagak**** pin-ni-si-r~…ĺin**** *** a mińß ¶aan ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-min i r~…ĺon-tun tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan musakamu tu bajkiŇč, itajaw ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-min misur~…ĺit tu sakaj ¶a ¶aj pakajniaj badisusu Ē~ ° ¶ir~…ĺ ¶aj pisuzikuz misur~…ĺit tu nigiŇčkiwan, i pitan…ôŇčan jadańß ku nipańßabaj tu kim kur~…ĺitana badisusu Ē~ ° ¶ir~…ĺkaj "s. aur…ôus", * a bur~…ĺad tu zikuz m…ô- ¶in tabu mańß…ôtik tini pipańßabajan, * a bur~…ĺan ¶i bow-r~…ĺa-min a tad…ômawan i inak misar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj mińßibaŇč, * a bur~…ĺad panukas tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° pitan…ôŇčan. mańßini ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-min maazińß niza sir~…ĺaŇčaw matum…ôs nu bajkiŇč ku pipańßabajan i kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° si ¶in-m…ô- ¶in, r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw naji Ē~ ° ku mur~…ĺaŇčawaj nu bajkiŇč, ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-min kas…ônun mazat…ôŇč ku m…ô- ¶in tan…ôŇč a mipataj tu bajkiŇč, kujni mańßiniaj musakamu i **** a mińß ¶aan nu iŇč-kow pitan…ôŇčan patańßkar~…ĺ tu migiŇčkiwaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. zikuz jadańß ku nisaŇča Ē~ °an niza a ¶a tu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj nitan…ôŇčan, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ mar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß tu bundaj, ńßi ¶a…ôn misaŇča Ē~ ° ku mańßiniaj pan-ni-si-r~…ĺin, ¶aŇču Ē~ °ut kujni a gizi ¶…ô, a ¶aaj kar~…ĺar~…ĺid sa miazińß migiŇčkiw, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ katańßkar~…ĺ nu ńßwaŇč-an a sapaju,, tad…ômaw amin sakaj ¶n-m…ô-su anipakatin…ôŇč ¶aaj kanamuńß. **** . **** a mińß ¶aan iŇč-kow niw- ¶in tar~…ĺakawaj ¶a ¶udadan migiŇčkiwaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶i-z…ôn ¶i bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺi atu mir~…ĺiwkuaj i iŇč-kowaj t…ô-kow migiŇčkiwaj ¶i ¶j…ôn-…ôn makakadum, migiŇčkiw tu kapańßaj a ¶in-m…ô-su, mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas atu ma ¶a ¶ajataj a ńßwa-s…ô, par~…ĺasawad tu ¶in-m…ôsu pisaŇča Ē~ ° a bundaj. zikuz saajawaj ni bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺi a migikiwaj a sakaput makaj ¶in-m…ô- ¶inan miar~…ĺa patańßkar~…ĺ tu kaŇč-s…ôn-su-pan-ni-si-r~…ĺin "siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu ¶in-m…ô-su", ." niw- ¶in migiŇčkiwaj ¶u-z…ôn ¶i ńßa-r~…ĺi-s "ńß…ônrj ńßarris" namusakamu, "inaji Ē~ ° ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-min, ¶aaj ka izaw ¶i ¶j…ôn-…ôn, naji Ē~ ° ¶i ¶j…ôn-…ôn, ¶ajaj ka izaw ¶i bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺi, inaji Ē~ ° ¶i bow-r~…ĺo…ô-r~…ĺi, ¶ajaj ka izaw ¶i si-t…ô-r~…ĺi, inaji Ē~ ° ¶i si-t…ô-r~…ĺi*, ainaji Ē~ ° ku pan-ni-si-r~…ĺin." **** a mińß ¶aan saajawaj a tad…ômaw mikinsaaj tu ¶in-m…ô-su, maazińß ku ¶in-m…ô-su, ńßamin masumad tu ku tad…ômaw atu mir~…ĺar~…ĺidaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu tu pataj a r~…ĺikisi, par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu nikauzip nu tad…ômaw amanajatu, namańßiza ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-min ¶i ¶j…ôn-…ôn atu ¶i bow-r~…ĺo…ô-r~…ĺi mapur~…ĺuŇč pakar~…ĺar~…ĺ tu **** a mińß ¶aan tu now-p…ô-ar~…ĺ-i-sj…ô a kawr~…ĺańß. kar~…ĺijuńßan a kawaw ** izaw ku ¶a ¶aj nakamuan nika ¶aaj ku tat…ôŇčaaj a kuŇčku, sakukamu mar~…ĺukaj a wama ni bow-r~…ĺaj-min namapauzip tu adidi Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ¶i ¶iw- ¶i-ar~…ĺnan, wama ni ¶iw- ¶i-ar~…ĺ patańßkar~…ĺ tu kar~…ĺisiw papi ¶udad ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-minan amar~…ĺa u sitin…ôŇčaj, zikuz ¶i ¶iw- ¶i-ar~…ĺ i saka tusa r~…ĺar~…ĺaisan a ¶a zajńßan u ¶in-m…ô-su makaj amapataj nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan mapauzip. ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-min pab…ôr~…ĺi tu tiŇčamian tu ¶abajan amatin…ôŇč, pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ a kamu kujni, zikuz pauzipaj ¶i ¶iw- ¶i-ar~…ĺnan a sapaju u ńßwaŇč-an a sapajuan ¶aaj ku ¶in-m…ô-su. ujni pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ a nakamuan r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan ńßakaj zajńßan ńßwaŇč-an nu t…ô-kow paj-ar~…ĺ a pitan…ôŇčan maazińß, i kar~…ĺar~…ĺaisan patinakaj a sakaput makai patinak na u adaaj a kanatar~…ĺ ku pakaazińßaj tu sapaju, manijur~…ĺ u iŇč-kow a tad…ômaw ku pakaazińßaj tu ¶in-m…ô-su.
S.FORM: Ya-li-san-ta.Bow-la-min(Amilika a kamu: Alexander FlemingÔľõHulam a kamu: šļěś≠∑ŚĪĪŚ§ß¬∑ŚľóŤźäśėé) kakiliman Ya-li-san-ta.Bow-la-min-cye-se,FRS "Sir Alexander Fleming,1881 a mihca8 a bulad 6 a demiad- 1955 a mihca 3 a bulad 11a demiad", Su-ke-lan migingkiway tu mauzipay, migingkiway tu sapayu, migingkiway tu mulangaway. 1923 a mihcaan mazih ku zung-cin-meey, 1928 a mihcaan maazih ku cin-mey-su, maazih kuyni mipatizeng tu kang-sen-su, singangan tu i hekal ciniza. 1945 a mihcaan, ciniza atu ci Bow-luw-li atu ci cyen-en zayhan sakay pigingkiw tu mey-su a kawaw pakala tu No-pey-al-sen-li-syey anucaay kalaw tu migingkiway tu imelang. nilaculan ÁĒüŚĻ≥ sumamad a nikauzip atu pasubana'ay (Lochfield), . Bow-lay-min lecuh i Su-ke-lan a Low-ke-bey-al-te "Lochfield", nakasu nasumamad u kaluk ku luma'ay. 1906 a mihcaan makay Lun-tunsen-ma-li-ya padekuan "St. Mary's Hospital" padekuay-ke a cacudadan pahezek. sumamad a nikauzip atu pasubana'ay (Lochfield), . Bow-lay-min lecuh i Su-ke-lan a Low-ke-bey-al-te "Lochfield", nakasu nasumamad u kaluk ku luma'ay. 1906 a mihcaan makay Lun-tunsen-ma-li-ya padekuan "St. Mary's Hospital" padekuay-ke a cacudadan pahezek. migingkiw tu kagakÁßĎŚ≠łÁ†ĒÁ©∂ pin-ni-si-linÁõ§ŚįľŤ•Ņśěó 928 a mihcaan ci Bow-lay-min i Lon-tun talakaway a cacudadan musakamu tu bayking, itayaw ci Bow-lay-min misulit tu sakay cacay pakayniay badisusu'cilcay pisuzikuz misulit tu nigingkiwan, i pitanengan yadah ku nipahabay tu kim kulitana badisusu'cilkay "S. aureus", 7 a bulad tu zikuz mey-cin tabu mahetik tini pipahabayan, 8 a bulan ci Bow-la-min a tademawan i inak misalihalay mihibang, 9 a bulad panukas taluma' pitanengan. mahini ci Bow-lay-min maazih niza silangaw matumes nu bayking ku pipahabayan i kalimucu' sicin-mey-cin, liwliw nayi' ku mulangaway nu bayking, ci Bow-lay-min kasenun mazateng ku mey-cin taneng a mipatay tu bayking, kuyni mahiniay musakamu i 1929 a mihcaan nu Ing-kow pitanengan patahkal tu migingkiway tu imelang. zikuz yadah ku nisanga'an niza aca tu malecaday nitanengan, kilul malikeluh tu bunday, hicaen misanga' ku mahiniay pan-ni-si-lin, cangu'ut kuyni a gizice, acaay kalalid sa miazih migingkiw, kilul katahkal nu hwang-an a sapayu,, tademaw amin sakay cn-mey-su anipakatineng caay kanamuh. 1935 . 1935 a mihcaan Ing-kow niw-cin talakaway cacudadan migingkiway tu imelang ci-zen ci Bow-low-li atu miliwkuay i Ing-koway Te-kow migingkiway ci Cyen-en makakadum, migingkiw tu kapahay a cin-mey-su, malaliyas atu macacayatay a hwa-sey, palasawad tu cin-meysu pisanga' a bunday. zikuz saayaway ni Bow-low-li a migikiway a sakaput makay cin-mey-cinan miala patahkal tu kang-sen-su-pan-ni-si-lin "singangan aca tu cin-mey-su", ." Niw-cin migingkiway cu-zen ci Ha-li-s "Henry Harris" namusakamu, "inayi' ci Bow-lay-min, caay ka izaw ci Cyen-en, nayi' ci Cyen-en, cayay ka izaw ci Bow-low-li, inayi' ci Bow-loe-li, cayay ka izaw ci Si-te-li, inayi' ci Si-te-lix, ainayi' ku pan-ni-si-lin." 1941 a mihcaan saayaway a tademaw mikinsaay tu cin-mey-su, maazih ku cin-mey-su, hamin masumad tu ku tademaw atu milaliday a imelangan malalebu tu patay a likisi, palalecad tu nikauzip nu tademaw amanayatu, namahiza ci Bow-lay-min ci Cyen-en atu ci Bow-loe-li mapulung pakalal tu 1945 a mihcaan tu Now-pey-al-i-sye a kawlah. kaliyuhan a kawaw ŤĽľšļč izaw ku cacay nakamuan nika caay ku tatengaay a kungku, sakukamu malukay a wama ni Bow-lay-min namapauzip tu adidi' henay ci Ciw-ci-alnan, wama ni Ciw-ci-al patahkal tu kalisiw papicudad ci Bow-lay-minan amala u sitinengay, zikuz ci Ciw-ci-al i saka tusa lalaisan aca zayhan u cin-mey-su makay amapatay nu imelangan mapauzip. Ci Bow-lay-min pabeli tu tingamian tu cabayan amatineng, patelac a kamu kuyni, zikuz pauzipay ci Ciw-ci-alnan a sapayu u hwang-an a sapayuan caay ku cin-mey-su. uyni patelac a nakamuan lalekalan hakay zayhan hwang-an nu Te-kow Pay-al a pitanengan maazih, i kalalaisan patinakay a sakaput makai patinak na u adaay a kanatal ku pakaazihay tu sapayu, maniyul u Ing-kow a tademaw ku pakaazihay tu cin-mey-su.

makaj r~…ĺun-tuns…ôn-ma-r~…ĺi-ja pad…ôkuan "st. marj Ē~ °s ńßospitar~…ĺ" pad…ôkuaj-k…ô a ¶a ¶udadan pańß…ôz…ôk. sumamad a nikauzip atu pasubana Ē~ °aj (r~…ĺo ¶ńßfi…ôr~…ĺd), . bow-r~…ĺaj-min r~…ĺ…ô ńßospitar~…ĺ" pad…ôkuaj-k…ô a ¶a ¶udadan pańß…ôz…ôk. migiŇčkiw tu kagak**** pin-ni-si-r~…ĺin**** *** a mińß ¶aan ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-min i r~…ĺon-tun tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan musakamu tu bajkiŇč, itajaw ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-min misur~…ĺit tu sakaj ¶a ¶aj pakajniaj badisusu Ē~ ° ¶ir~…ĺ ¶aj pisuzikuz misur~…ĺit tu nigiŇčkiwan, i pitan…ôŇčan jadańß ku nipańßabaj tu kim kur~…ĺitana badisusu Ē~ ° ¶ir~…ĺkaj "s. aur…ôus", * a bur~…ĺad tu zikuz m…ô- ¶in tabu mańß…ôtik tini pipańßabajan, * a bur~…ĺan ¶i bow-r~…ĺa-min a tad…ômawan i inak misar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj mińßibaŇč, * a bur~…ĺad panukas tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° pitan…ôŇčan. mańßini ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-min maazińß niza sir~…ĺaŇčaw matum…ôs nu bajkiŇč ku pipańßabajan i kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° si ¶in-m…ô- ¶in, r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw naji Ē~ ° ku mur~…ĺaŇčawaj nu bajkiŇč, ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-min kas…ônun mazat…ôŇč ku m…ô- ¶in tan…ôŇč a mipataj tu bajkiŇč, kujni mańßiniaj musakamu i **** a mińß ¶aan nu iŇč-kow pitan…ôŇčan patańßkar~…ĺ tu migiŇčkiwaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. zikuz jadańß ku nisaŇča Ē~ °an niza a ¶a tu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj nitan…ôŇčan, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ mar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß tu bundaj, ńßi ¶a…ôn misaŇča Ē~ ° ku mańßiniaj pan-ni-si-r~…ĺin, ¶aŇču Ē~ °ut kujni a gizi ¶…ô, a ¶aaj kar~…ĺar~…ĺid sa miazińß migiŇčkiw, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ katańßkar~…ĺ nu ńßwaŇč-an a sapaju,, tad…ômaw amin sakaj ¶n-m…ô-su anipakatin…ôŇč ¶aaj kanamuńß. **** . **** a mińß ¶aan iŇč-kow niw- ¶in tar~…ĺakawaj ¶a ¶udadan migiŇčkiwaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶i-z…ôn ¶i bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺi atu mir~…ĺiwkuaj i iŇč-kowaj t…ô-kow migiŇčkiwaj ¶i ¶j…ôn-…ôn makakadum, migiŇčkiw tu kapańßaj a ¶in-m…ô-su, mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas atu ma ¶a ¶ajataj a ńßwa-s…ô, par~…ĺasawad tu ¶in-m…ôsu pisaŇča Ē~ ° a bundaj. zikuz saajawaj ni bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺi a migikiwaj a sakaput makaj ¶in-m…ô- ¶inan miar~…ĺa patańßkar~…ĺ tu kaŇč-s…ôn-su-pan-ni-si-r~…ĺin "siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu ¶in-m…ô-su", ." niw- ¶in migiŇčkiwaj ¶u-z…ôn ¶i ńßa-r~…ĺi-s "ńß…ônrj ńßarris" namusakamu, "inaji Ē~ ° ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-min, ¶aaj ka izaw ¶i ¶j…ôn-…ôn, naji Ē~ ° ¶i ¶j…ôn-…ôn, ¶ajaj ka izaw ¶i bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺi, inaji Ē~ ° ¶i bow-r~…ĺo…ô-r~…ĺi, ¶ajaj ka izaw ¶i si-t…ô-r~…ĺi, inaji Ē~ ° ¶i si-t…ô-r~…ĺi*, ainaji Ē~ ° ku pan-ni-si-r~…ĺin." **** a mińß ¶aan saajawaj a tad…ômaw mikinsaaj tu ¶in-m…ô-su, maazińß ku ¶in-m…ô-su, ńßamin masumad tu ku tad…ômaw atu mir~…ĺar~…ĺidaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu tu pataj a r~…ĺikisi, par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu nikauzip nu tad…ômaw amanajatu, namańßiza ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-min ¶i ¶j…ôn-…ôn atu ¶i bow-r~…ĺo…ô-r~…ĺi mapur~…ĺuŇč pakar~…ĺar~…ĺ tu **** a mińß ¶aan tu now-p…ô-ar~…ĺ-i-sj…ô a kawr~…ĺańß. kar~…ĺijuńßan a kawaw ** izaw ku ¶a ¶aj nakamuan nika ¶aaj ku tat…ôŇčaaj a kuŇčku, sakukamu mar~…ĺukaj a wama ni bow-r~…ĺaj-min namapauzip tu adidi Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ¶i ¶iw- ¶i-ar~…ĺnan, wama ni ¶iw- ¶i-ar~…ĺ patańßkar~…ĺ tu kar~…ĺisiw papi ¶udad ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-minan amar~…ĺa u sitin…ôŇčaj, zikuz ¶i ¶iw- ¶i-ar~…ĺ i saka tusa r~…ĺar~…ĺaisan a ¶a zajńßan u ¶in-m…ô-su makaj amapataj nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan mapauzip. ¶i bow-r~…ĺaj-min pab…ôr~…ĺi tu tiŇčamian tu ¶abajan amatin…ôŇč, pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ a kamu kujni, zikuz pauzipaj ¶i ¶iw- ¶i-ar~…ĺnan a sapaju u ńßwaŇč-an a sapajuan ¶aaj ku ¶in-m…ô-su. ujni pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ a nakamuan r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan ńßakaj zajńßan ńßwaŇč-an nu t…ô-kow paj-ar~…ĺ a pitan…ôŇčan maazińß, i kar~…ĺar~…ĺaisan patinakaj a sakaput makai patinak na u adaaj a kanatar~…ĺ ku pakaazińßaj tu sapaju, manijur~…ĺ u iŇč-kow a tad…ômaw ku pakaazińßaj tu ¶in-m…ô-su.
